svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="zoGHK7mHDyVil3nz1zuQ"> <mxGraphModel dx="1245" dy="659" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
title Sequence Diagram - Communication Loss in Truck Platooning

actor \"Truck\" as Truck
participant \"Communication Module\" as Comm
participant \"Platoon Leader\" as Leader
participant \"Platoon Controller\" as Controller

Truck -> Comm : Send heartbeat message
Comm -> Leader : Forward heartbeat/status
Leader -> Controller : Update normal platoon status

loop Continuous monitoring
 Comm -> Comm : Check communication signal
end

Comm -> Comm : Detect timeout
Comm -> Truck : Communication loss detected

Truck -> Truck : Enter Safe Mode
Truck -> Truck : Increase following distance

Truck -> Leader : Notify communication loss
Leader -> Controller : Update platoon status

Truck -> Comm : Attempt reconnection

alt Communication restored
 Comm -> Leader : Reconnection request
 Leader -> Controller : Validate platoon conditions
 Controller --> Leader : Conditions safe
 Leader -> Truck : Rejoin approved
 Truck -> Truck : Rejoin platoon
 Truck -> Comm : Resume normal communication
else Communication not restored
 Comm -> Truck : Reconnection failed
 Truck -> Truck : Leave platoon safely
 Truck -> Controller : Switch to standalone driving mode
end

@enduml",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="cngy23HOfiaUbgVJKzD1-1"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="925" width="716" x="67" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
